_description: Eligibility rules and confidence thresholds. Tunable per customer / OEM contract.
_calibrationStatus: STARTER — confirm thresholds with HKP customer, especially borderline grace days

thresholds._humanReviewNote: Any disposition with confidence below this triggers Request Manager Approval flow even if auto-approve
thresholds._borderlineNote: RMAs filed within N days past warranty end → unclear (request more info or goodwill consideration)
thresholds._minDescNote: Descriptions shorter than this → unclear, request_more_info

R5_misuse_keywords_first.description: Any misuse keyword detected → ineligible regardless of warranty status
R5_misuse_keywords_first.reason: Description contains misuse keywords (water/impact/surge/etc.) — warranty exclusion under HKP terms
R5_misuse_keywords_first.appliesIf: any keyword from failure_modes.json:misuse appears in ProblemDescription

R4_too_short_description.description: Description under 60 chars or no failure mode keyword → cannot decide
R4_too_short_description.reason: Description too short to evaluate failure mode. Need more detail.

R2_well_past_warranty.description: More than 90 days past warranty end → ineligible
R2_well_past_warranty.reasonTemplate: Out of warranty by {daysPastWarranty} days (more than {borderlineGraceDays}-day grace). Recommend offering paid repair quote.

R3_borderline_warranty.description: Within 0-90 days past warranty end → unclear
R3_borderline_warranty.reasonTemplate: Just past warranty (+{daysPastWarranty} days, within {borderlineGraceDays}-day grace). Need usage data + duty cycle.

R1_in_warranty_defect_match.reason: In warranty + failure mode matches known manufacturing-defect category.

R_install_environment.description: In warranty + EMI/installation keyword → unclear (engineer review)
R_install_environment.reason: In warranty but description suggests installation environment (EMI / VFD / grounding) — could be defect or installation issue. Need engineer review.

R_in_warranty_default_unclear.description: In warranty but failure mode unclear → request more info
R_in_warranty_default_unclear.reason: In warranty but failure mode unclear — could be defect or expected wear. Need additional evidence.
